negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: av_2ed9ef3e-510b-447d-a947-fdbcb3004285
prompt: The video begins with a view from inside a black vehicle, positioned at an intersection marked by a stop lane marker on the road. The scene is set in a suburban area with a mix of residential houses and greenery. On the left side of the intersection, there's a dark-colored sedan parked along the curb. In front of the ego vehicle, a white sedan is stopped at the intersection, facing the opposite direction of the camera. The road features yellow lane markings and a crosswalk. Surrounding the intersection are tall trees, including evergreens and deciduous varieties, some of which have blossoms. A stop sign is visible on the right side of the intersection, and a pedestrian crossing sign is visible across the street. In the middle of the intersection, a no-left-turn sign can be seen. Exactly above it, another sign shows a one-way sign pointing to the right.  As the video progresses, the white sedan comes to a stop and then turns right. Meanwhile, the dark-colored sedan remains stationary on the left side of the intersection. A man walking with a dog on the right sidewalk behind the stop sign is visible. The surrounding trees and houses provide a consistent backdrop, with no significant changes in their appearance or position. The overall scene remains tranquil, with the actions being the movement of the white sedan and the man walking with a dog on the sidewalk. By the end of the video, the white sedan has completed its turn and is driving away down the road, while the dark-colored sedan remains parked on the left side of the intersection. The pedestrian continues walking, and the surrounding trees and houses maintain their positions, preserving the serene suburban atmosphere. The stop sign and pedestrian crossing continue to stand in place.  A medium shot from a slightly elevated perspective captures the intersection, emphasizing the stop lane marker, the no-left-turn sign, and the one-way sign. The camera remains steady throughout, focusing on the interaction between the vehicles and the pedestrian, highlighting the calm and orderly nature of the suburban setting.
